message:
🐛 Fix dashboard card height not applying from config (#948)

DashboardComponents.tsx used `gridRow: span N` for card height, but the
grid has no explicit row sizing so spans were a no-op. Switch to
`minHeight` inline style (cardHeight * 100px) so height configs actually
take effect.

Also reduce Pareto Frontier default height from h:16 to h:8 (800px).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
